name: Noob: Zombie Prison Escape
author: Poki
description: Noob: Zombie Prison Escape is an action-packed platformer set in a blocky, zombie-infested world. Help Noob escape from a dangerous prison by solving puzzles, collecting keys and coins, dodging traps, and using parkour skills to navigate tricky platforms. Arm yourself with a crossbow to fend off hordes of monsters, light torches to complete tasks, and tackle challenges across 10 exciting levels. Can you guide Noob to freedom and survive the zombie chaos? How to play Noob: Zombie Prison Escape? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Camera: mouse Action: E Hit: left click Who created Noob: Zombie Prison Escape? Noob: Zombie Prison Escape was created by DAPALAB. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Noob: Zombie Prison Escape for free? You can play Noob: Zombie Prison Escape for free on Poki. Can I play Noob: Zombie Prison Escape on mobile devices and desktops? Noob: Zombie Prison Escape can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
